name: Registration and Stamp Duty
text: The Parties acknowledge that this Agreement may be required to be registered under the Registration Act, 1908, if the lease is for a term exceeding one (1) year. The cost of stamp duty and registration charges shall be borne equally by both Parties unless otherwise agreed. This Agreement shall be stamped in accordance with the applicable State Stamp Act and the Indian Stamp Act, 1899. The Landlord/Licensor shall ensure that the original registered document is kept safely and a certified copy is provided to the Tenant/Licensee upon request. Non-registration of a compulsorily registrable lease shall render it inadmissible as evidence of the terms of the lease under the Registration Act, 1908.
invalid_if: Lease exceeds one year and is not registered
Stamp duty has not been paid
title: Registration and Stamp Duty

jurisdiction_constraints.Maharashtra: Maharashtra Stamp Act 1958 — stamp duty + registration fee; book at Sub-Registrar
jurisdiction_constraints.Delhi: Delhi Stamp Act 2001; DORIS portal for online registration
jurisdiction_constraints.Karnataka: Karnataka Stamp Act 1957; Kaveri portal for registration

dispute_hotspots: Unregistered lease for >12 months — inadmissible as evidence per Registration Act S.49
Stamp duty deficiency — document impounded and party must pay deficit + penalty
Authority to register — power of attorney must be registered separately
Online vs physical registration — availability varies by state
